name: SCARLET WITCH
description: Wanda Maximoff is adept at harnessing formidable chaos magic, casting hexes with the power to twist and reshape reality itself. Energy, space, and matter are mere playthings in the hands of Scarlet Witch!
lore: Wanda Maximoff's ability to manipulate chaos magic makes her one of the most powerful living beings in the universe. As the Scarlet Witch, she seeks to harness that chaos, restoring some semblance of order to a world that is constantly on the brink of destruction. Since the Timestream Entanglement, chaos magic is one of the few forces holding the threads of reality together. Should her powers fail, the Scarlet Witch truly believes that this universe will disintegrate, along with everyone in it. It is a fate she refuses to allow… no matter the cost…

abilities.name: Chaos Control
abilities.description: Unleash Chaos Magic on enemies to deal damage and restore Chaos Energy

stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 3m and a height of 20m
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 10m, decreasing to 90% at 20m
stats.Special Effect 1: Attack the nearest enemy within range
stats.Special Effect 2: Hitting with Chaos Control charges Chthonian Burst

abilities.name: Reality Erasure
abilities.description: Engage in free-flight while charging energy, then unleash it to deal massive damage

stats.Slow Rate: Begin to slow down by 1.5s, with the effect gradually increasing to -25% by 3.5s
stats.Special Effect: During this period, Scarlet Witch enters a Free-flight state, pulls in nearby enemies (within 15m radius) during cast charge. Max pull speed up to 3m/s

abilities.name: Mystic Projection
abilities.description: Enter the Phased state for free-flight. Press again to exit early

stats.Special Effect: During this period, Scarlet Witch enters the Projection state, can be healed by teammates

abilities.name: Dark Seal
abilities.description: Land a hit on a target or the scene, or press E to generate a Force Field that periodically Stuns enemies within range

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Chthonian Burst
abilities.description: Consume Chaos Energy to fire explosive magic missiles, damaging enemies

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

received.name: Sorcery Surge
received.description: Doctor Strange shares his arcane mastery, replacing Scarlet Witch's Chthonian Burst with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact
stats.Special Mechanic: Chaos Control can released during the Sorcery Surge

base.description: Chthonian Burst is replaced with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Doctor Strange, Scarlet Witch's maximum total Chaos Energy pool increases, and Chaos Control generates energy much faster when attacking.

base.description: Infuse firework energy into the Dark Seal forcefield, turning it into a Plasmoid Seal, allowing for a secondary blast. After expanding the Plasmoid Seal, pressing the {Ability1} key again while it persists will detonate the fireworks, dealing damage and inflicting Vulnerability.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Jubilee, Scarlet Witch receives constant healing from the firework energy while using Mystic Projection.
